name: Lair of the Beast
Prerequisites: Smear Vitae over a central point of the territory.
Effect: Extends the vampire's Predatory Aura over the entire territory, allowing them to sense and magically lash out at trespassing predators.

name: Pangs of Proserpina
Prerequisites: Target must be within a mile.
Effect: Inflicts intense hunger on a victim, provoking frenzy in vampires.

name: Rigor Mortis
Prerequisites: Target must be a vampire within a mile.
Effect: Suppresses the reanimating power of Vitae in another vampire, penalizing their next physical action.

name: Cheval
Prerequisites: Physically touch the subject during casting.
Effect: Forms a mystic connection allowing the ritualist to see and hear everything the subject experiences for the rest of the night.

name: The Mantle of Amorous Fire
Prerequisites: Enact the Blush of Life and dance in an ecstatic trance.
Effect: The vampire stands proud, fiery, and lusty, adding her Crúac dots to her Presence for the remainder of the evening.

name: The Pool of Forbidden Truths
Prerequisites: Spill blood into a vessel containing a vector for prophecy (tea, bones, etc.).
Effect: Grants the Primeval Truths Condition. Allows the caster to see truths beyond reality to divine answers to specific questions.

name: Ma'at and Rauket
Prerequisites: Living sapient mortal sacrifice if Vitae cost exceeds 1.
Effect: Introduces chaos into an area, completely disrupting spiritual influence and reversing its resonant properties.

name: Ahmet's Pursuit
Prerequisites: A material focus (effigy) and a living sapient mortal sacrifice if Vitae cost exceeds 1.
Effect: Victim suffers the Lost Condition regardless of navigation success; the caster always knows where the victim runs.

name: Taste the Land / Urban Unrest
Prerequisites: Feed from a mortal resident of the territory.
Effect: Reads or alters the emotional mood of the local population within the territory, granting bonuses to exploit that mood.

name: Territory's Wisdom
Prerequisites: Feed on an employee of a business in the territory.
Effect: Forms a sympathetic link to the site, allowing the caster to spend Vitae to boost a Mental or Social Skill appropriate to that site.

name: The Hydra's Vitae
Prerequisites: None specified.
Effect: Transforms the ritualist's own blood into a toxic poison that damages anyone who drinks it and offers no nourishment.

name: Deflection of Wooden Doom
Prerequisites: None specified.
Effect: Wards the ritualist, causing all attempts to impale their heart with a stake to fail until the next sunrise.

name: Mantle of the Beast's Breath
Prerequisites: Dance in an ecstatic trance, enact Blush of Life, spend a point of Willpower.
Effect: Grants the Raptured Condition and adds Crúac dots as a bonus to rolls for riding the wave of frenzy.

name: Mantle of the Glorious Dervish
Prerequisites: Dance in an ecstatic trance, enact Blush of Life, spend a point of Willpower.
Effect: Grants a point of armor against all attacks, bonus damage on strikes, and immunity to being ambushed or surprised.

name: Taurobolium
Prerequisites: Bathe in the Vitae of a Galloi along with perfumes and oils sacred to Cybele.
Effect: Transforms the subject into a gorgeous, idealized version of themselves, adding the Striking Looks Merit and social advantages.

name: The Hand of Seth
Prerequisites: A scrap of the possessed vessel's DNA and a living sapient mortal sacrifice if Vitae cost exceeds 1.
Effect: Forcibly compels a spirit or Strix out of a possessed body within a mile, preventing it from re-possessing the victim for the scene.

name: Sanguine Auger
Prerequisites: Must target a recent victim the caster has fed upon.
Effect: Grants cryptic visions revealing hidden information about the target, such as Touchstones, bloodlines, Merits, or lineage.

name: Wisdom of the Blood
Prerequisites: Must target the mind of a torpid vampire.
Effect: Taps into the collective unconscious of the Kindred to ask questions and receive brief, truthful prophecies via dreams.

name: Nowhere to Run
Prerequisites: Pour Vitae over a map of the territory and draw symbols of protection.
Effect: Imposes a localized Environmental Tilt (such as extreme weather or physical hazard) on a small section of the territory.

name: Kin to the Land
Prerequisites: Spread the sacrifice at four equidistant corners within the territory.
Effect: Forms false Blood Sympathy ties, mystically forcing mortal residents of the territory to count as blood relatives to the vampire.

name: Touch of the Morrigan
Prerequisites: None specified.
Effect: Channels the Beast into the open palm, dealing lethal damage equal to the ritual's Potency on the first strike.

name: Blood Price
Prerequisites: The subject must be present during the casting.
Effect: Mystically claims any Vitae consumed by the ritual's subject, redirecting the nourishment to the ritualist instead.

name: Willful Vitae
Prerequisites: None specified.
Effect: Makes the ritualist completely immune to the Vinculum (blood bonds) and Vitae addiction for the remainder of the night.

name: Shed the Virulent Bowels
Prerequisites: Must possess a lock of hair, nail clipping, or bodily waste from a living victim.
Effect: Causes the victim's bowels to violently eject (or choke on materialized nails), inflicting massive lethal damage at a rate of one point per turn.

name: Curse of Aphrodite's Favor
Prerequisites: Creates a potion that the victim must consume in three drops on three separate nights.
Effect: Inflicts an all-consuming obsession functioning as a full Vinculum toward a specific subject.

name: Curse of the Beloved Toy
Prerequisites: A victim, a beloved possession, the murder of the victim during casting, and an investment of at least 3 Vitae.
Effect: Binds the murdered victim's soul to their possession, cursing any new owner with terrible luck and dramatic failures.

name: Mantle of the Predator Goddess
Prerequisites: Dance in an ecstatic trance, enact Blush of Life, spend a point of Willpower.
Effect: Grants the grace of a perfect predator, adding Crúac dots to feeding and the Herd Merit, and inflicting the Raptured condition on victims.

name: Doom of Osiris
Prerequisites: Living sapient mortal sacrifice if Vitae cost exceeds 1.
Effect: Blesses a bladed weapon to inflict aggravated damage directly to ephemeral beings and Strix.

name: Clotho's Skein
Prerequisites: None specified.
Effect: Allows the caster's mind to remain aware during rest, navigating the slumbering mind to implant a single thought or idea into a target.

name: Nowhere to Hide
Prerequisites: Mark an open-air part of the territory with the sacrifice.
Effect: Automatically foils all Stealth actions in the territory, and makes Obfuscate fail unless the user prevails in a Clash of Wills.

name: Prince's Wrath
Prerequisites: Stab own shadow or Ka at a central point in the territory, taking lethal damage.
Effect: Infuses the area with a nightmarish manifestation of the Beast; mortal residents cannot spend Willpower to defy the caster.

name: Blood Blight
Prerequisites: None specified.
Effect: Mystically destroys the victim's blood, inflicting lethal damage on mortals and instantly draining Vitae from vampires.

name: Feeding the Crone
Prerequisites: None specified.
Effect: Transforms the vampire's fangs into a maw of wicked, flesh-tearing teeth that deal aggravated damage.

name: Gorgon's Gaze
Prerequisites: Infects the caster's eyes with a milky substance, rendering them blind while the ritual is prepared.
Effect: The next time someone looks into the caster's eyes, their limbs turn to stone, inflicting aggravated wounds.

name: Bounty of the Storm
Prerequisites: A deeply personal object from the victim.
Effect: Curses the victim with a devastating localized storm that causes bashing damage, followed by a windfall of coincidental wealth.

name: Denying Hades
Prerequisites: Feed the Vitae used in the casting to a recently dead mortal's corpse.
Effect: Forcibly pulls the spirit back into the rotting corpse, keeping the victim conscious but eternally decaying.

name: Birthing the God
Prerequisites: An entire coven must sacrifice Vitae and body parts to build a full humanoid form.
Effect: Crafts a terrifying, patchwork abomination that bursts from the ritualist, possessing its own Disciplines and traits.

name: Mantle of the Crone
Prerequisites: Dance in an ecstatic trance, spend a point of Willpower.
Effect: The ritualist takes on the terrifying bearing of the Crone; her touch inflicts aggravated wounds.

name: Manananggal's Working
Prerequisites: The caster must physically cut off parts of her own body; all Vitae sacrificed must be her own.
Effect: Detached body parts animate and perform independent tasks driven by Vitae, returning at sunrise.

name: Gwydion's Curse
Prerequisites: Soak the earth with the sacrificed Vitae.
Effect: Animates all trees and large plants in the area to brutally attack anyone within reach.

name: Scapegoat
Prerequisites: Rip out own Humanity and feed the sacrificed Vitae to a mortal.
Effect: Passes the caster's banes and detachment breaking points onto the victim until the next sunrise.

name: Feast of the Ra
Prerequisites: Prepare a feast of Vitae and food, living sapient mortal sacrifice if Vitae cost exceeds 1.
Effect: Summons a Mekhet's Ka (ghostly shadow), granting it the Materialized condition to bargain with it.

name: The Thrashing of Apeps Coils
Prerequisites: Impale the sacrifice with a spear, living sapient mortal sacrifice if Vitae cost exceeds 1.
Effect: Summons extreme storms, imposing the Heavy Rains Tilt (and optionally Heavy Winds) over the area.

name: Tie to the Land
Prerequisites: Kill a resident and spread blood at five equidistant points in the territory.
Effect: Forms false blood bonds (Vinculum) with the mortal residents of the territory.

name: Red Tick
Prerequisites: Sacrifice a permanent dot of Blood Potency (returns at the end of the month).
Effect: Turns the city's plumbing and infrastructure into a source of flowing, addictive Vitae that causes blood bonds.
